title: Bhangarh Fort
tagline: Bhangarh Fort — heritage city of Rajasthan

overview.short: The Bhangarh Fort is a 16th-century fort built in the Rajasthan state of India.
overview.description: The Bhangarh Fort is a 16th-century fort built in the Rajasthan state of India. The town was established during the rule of Bhagwant Das as the residence of his second son, Madho Singh. The fort and its precincts are well preserved.

topPlaces.name: Bhangarh
topPlaces.description: Bhangarh is a village situated in Rajgarh Alwar, Rajasthan state of India. It is situated in the Rajgarh municipality of the Alwar district in Rajasthan.

topPlaces.name: Sainthal, Rajasthan
topPlaces.description: Sainthal is a town and a nagar panchayat in Dausa district in the Indian state of Rajasthan. Sainthal is 24 kilometres from Dausa city.

items.note: Bhangarh is a village situated in Rajgarh Alwar, Rajasthan state of India. It is situated in the Rajgarh municipality of the Alwar district in Rajasthan.
Sainthal is a town and a nagar panchayat in Dausa district in the Indian state of Rajasthan. Sainthal is 24 kilometres from Dausa city.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhangarh Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhangarh Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhangarh Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jaipur International Airport (56 km) and the nearest railway station is Jaipur Junction (53 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhangarh Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhangarh Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhangarh Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Bhangarh Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhangarh Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhangarh, Sainthal, Rajasthan.
